steps.description: Click the "Skip" link in the lower-left corner of the VS Code welcome sign-in dialog to bypass authentication options.
Click the “Source Control” icon (third item with the branch symbol and "M3" badge) in the left sidebar of the Visual Studio Code interface to open the Source Control view.
Click the "Create a New Agent/App" button in the MICROSOFT 365 AGENTS TOOLKIT panel on the left side of the Visual Studio Code interface.
